repomix.user_provided_header: Repo bundle generated by Repomix (XML output, compressed). Focus on core runtime code first: api/, sidequest/, frontend/, scripts/, config/. Docs are mostly excluded to control token bloat. Git diffs/logs are disabled.
repomix.directory_structure: .claude/ cache/ commands/ hooks/ skills/ ast-grep-mcp-expert/ references/ environment-setup-analyzer/ review/ verification-loop/ agents/ worktrees/ .github/ workflows/ ci.yml .playwright-mcp/ mcp-docs/ ast-grep/ browserbase/ cloudflare-ai-gateway/ cloudflare-browser-rendering/ cloudflare-observability/ cloudflare-radar/ cloudflare-workers-bindings/ doppler-custom/ fetch/ filesystem/ github/ linkedin/ mcp-cron/ memory/ openapi/ porkbun/ porkbun-custom/ postgres/ redis/ scheduler-mcp/ schema-org/ supabase/ scripts/ all_tools_results.json analysis_output_helpers.py analyze_analyticsbot.py analyze_violations.py analyze-duplicates.py backfill-skill-spans.py benchmark_batch_coverage.py benchmark_parallel_enrichment.py categorize-magic-numbers.ts cleanup-error-logs.ts deploy-traditional-server.sh find_duplication.sh find_large_classes.sh fix_import_orphans.py fix_imports.py fix_migration_errors.py fix-types.ts generate-http-status-constants.ts generate-sidequest-gitlog.sh import_helpers.py list_complexity_violations.py migrate_print_to_logger.py migrate_prints_smart.py migration_common.py README-SCRIPTS.md README.md replace-magic.sh run_all_analysis.py run_all_tools.py run_benchmarks.py run-python-tests.sh scan_complexity_offenders.py schema-graph-builder.py validate-permissions.ts verify-bugfixes.sh verify-setup.ts warm-doppler-cache.sh src/ ast_grep_mcp/ core/ features/ complexity/ condense/ cross_language/ deduplication/ documentation/ quality/ refactoring/ rewrite/ schema/ search/ models/ server/ utils/ CLAUDE.md GEMINI.md README.md
repomix.instruction: Modular MCP server with ast-grep structural code search, Schema.org tools, refactoring, deduplication, quality, documentation generation, and semantic code condensation.
